title: Pachira rurrenabaqueana

The classification of Pachira rurrenabaqueana is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. Within the genus Pachira, Pachira rurrenabaqueana is one of the lesser-known species. Further research is needed to fully understand its classification and relationship to other Pachira species.
